task_prompt: From the 'R Scripts' folder, run Main.Rmd. Do NOT run the Supplements.Rmd file
tasks: Based on the replication results, what is the total sample size of the twitter dataset (Politicians+Newspeople+Activists)? Report only the number.
From Figure2_coefficient_plot.pdf plot results, what is the coefficient of moral words on hate speech for the politicians dataset? Only report the number rounded to three decimal places.
From Figure2_coefficient_plot.pdf plot results, what is the odds ratio of moral-emotional words on hate speech for the activists dataset? Only report the number rounded to three decimal places.
From replication results, is the effect of purely emotional words on the likelihood of receiving hate for politicians significant at the p < 0.01 level? Report only Yes or No.
From replication results, is the effect of purely emotional words on the likelihood of receiving hate for politicians substantially smaller than moral words? Report only Yes or No.
From replication results, how many times larger is the coefficient of moral words compared to emotional words for politicians? Report only the ratio rounded to the nearest integer number.
